title: fraxinus bungeana var. pubinervis
intro: Fraxinus bungeana var. pubinervis, also known as the Bungee Manchurian ash, is a deciduous tree species in the family Oleaceae. It is traditionally used in herbal medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant activities. The plant is valued for its potential health benefits, such as reducing fever, relieving pain, and improving cardiovascular health. Fraxinus bungeana var. pubinervis is often prepared as a tea or tincture, and its bark is also used to make a decoction for medicinal purposes.
